summary.intent: Enhance the Moltis website to showcase supported AI providers/LLMs via styled pills (inspired by Polyphony), update the hero tagline, and extract CSS to a separate file.
summary.outcome: Added a 'Works with your stack' section with 4 rows of glassmorphism provider pills with official brand icons, extracted all CSS to style.css, updated the hero title/subtitle, and committed/pushed as PR #567.

repo: Website lives at website/index.en.html with locale variants (other locale files not yet updated)
Icons are stored in website/images/icons/ — SVGs preferred, raster fallbacks for brands without SVG (LM Studio .webp, MiniMax .png)
Project is at github.com/moltis-org/moltis, worktree at /Users/penso/.superset/worktrees/moltis/thoughtful-pint/
Dark mode is controlled via a .dark CSS class, not a media query
pill-icon vs pill-icon-color CSS class distinction: SVG icons use invert filter for dark mode, raster color logos use grayscale+invert

code.finding: New file — all pill styles including glassmorphism, scroll-reveal, dark mode overrides, pill-icon (invert on dark) and pill-icon-color (grayscale, no invert) classes
Pills section placed after value proposition cards, not between screenshot gallery and cards (position was moved mid-session)

workflow: Simple Icons (simpleicons.org) is the reliable source for official brand SVGs at small sizes
Raster logos fetched from official brand sites should be cropped to icon-only before use — MiniMax's logo URL included the full wordmark
Inline SVGs in HTML are harder to maintain than external files — extract to images/icons/ early
pill-icon currentColor approach works for monochrome SVGs but breaks for colored/raster logos — need separate CSS class from the start
ImageMagick can crop images to isolate icon portion from wordmark logos

friction: Teams and DeepSeek icons required multiple iterations — initial hand-drawn SVGs didn't render well at 16px
MiniMax logo URL pointed to a full wordmark image requiring cropping after the fact
Cerebras icon went through multiple attempts before getting correct concentric arcs
CSS was added inline first and only extracted to style.css after user explicitly requested it — should have been separate from the start
Dev server background task notifications arrived late and cluttered the conversation
Hit rate limit mid-session, required user to prompt 'proceed' to continue
open_items: Changes are only in index.en.html — other locale files not yet updated
LM Studio has no official SVG; using .webp app icon with grayscale filter as workaround
MiniMax, Z.AI, and Venice pills have no widely recognized icon — Z.AI uses a custom lettermark
Moonshot/Kimi icon is a custom letterform, not an official asset
GraphQL icon was updated in the final commit but Teams/other icons may still not be fully official
